'''âr-j-d-w''' ('''karajdewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unattach|unattach]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-j-d-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unattach|unattach]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-j-d-w
|-
! Lemma
| karajdewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirajdewoko|thirajdewoko]] || [[word:jirajdewoko|jirajdewoko]] || [[word:shirajdewoko|shirajdewoko]] || [[word:kirajdewoko|kirajdewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurajdewoko|thuthurajdewoko]] || [[word:jujurajdewoko|jujurajdewoko]] || [[word:shushurajdewoko|shushurajdewoko]] || [[word:kukurajdewoko|kukurajdewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurajdewoko|thurajdewoko]] || [[word:jurajdewoko|jurajdewoko]] || [[word:shurajdewoko|shurajdewoko]] || [[word:kurajdewoko|kurajdewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurajdewoko|thurajdewoko]] || [[word:jurajdewoko|jurajdewoko]] || [[word:shurajdewoko|shurajdewoko]] || [[word:kurajdewoko|kurajdewoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorajdewoko|thothorajdewoko]] || [[word:jojorajdewoko|jojorajdewoko]] || [[word:shoshorajdewoko|shoshorajdewoko]] || [[word:kokorajdewoko|kokorajdewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorajdewoko|thorajdewoko]] || [[word:jorajdewoko|jorajdewoko]] || [[word:shorajdewoko|shorajdewoko]] || [[word:korajdewoko|korajdewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorajdewoko|thorajdewoko]] || [[word:jorajdewoko|jorajdewoko]] || [[word:shorajdewoko|shorajdewoko]] || [[word:korajdewoko|korajdewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrajdewoko|thĂŠrajdewoko]] || [[word:jĂŠrajdewoko|jĂŠrajdewoko]] || [[word:shĂŠrajdewoko|shĂŠrajdewoko]] || [[word:kĂŠrajdewoko|kĂŠrajdewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharajdewoko|thatharajdewoko]] || [[word:jajarajdewoko|jajarajdewoko]] || [[word:shasharajdewoko|shasharajdewoko]] || [[word:kakarajdewoko|kakarajdewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharajdewoko|tharajdewoko]] || [[word:jarajdewoko|jarajdewoko]] || [[word:sharajdewoko|sharajdewoko]] || [[word:karajdewoko|karajdewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharajdewoko|tharajdewoko]] || [[word:jarajdewoko|jarajdewoko]] || [[word:sharajdewoko|sharajdewoko]] || [[word:karajdewoko|karajdewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
